creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
See attached patch (a git commit on top of the freebsd/freebsd-ports mirror on Github):

    Build/install fix for sysutils/linux-crashplan
    
    The JRE 1.7 version was missing, and the install.vars generation tried to
    use the now removed JRE 1.6.
    
    Bump PORTREVISION to ensure users get a new install.vars
